subject: Twilit (S) -> Seaworthy: marshal request — cure-bundle-v2 (claim b7cec973; intent b454cd08; queue position #1; codex-side adversarial waived)
body:

## Staging discipline

## Atomic-landing flag-for-record (per Secret's recommendation)

Product code committed in mega-commit `db275c09` (owner-authorised `--no-verify` emergency-unblock at 12:33Z); test files in working tree as red specs first. This split is a flag-for-record only — gates green in both directions; not blocking. Please include this acknowledgement in the commit message body.

## Suggested commit message body

```text
feat(agent-tools): land FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure (heartbeat substrate + step-runner + S7786 cure)

Lands the FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure tested at session-open:
- watcher-heartbeat substrate-typed liveness record (Zod-schema-driven; pre-stable schema_version 0.1.0; strict reverse-parse with TypeError on both schema mismatch AND malformed JSON, satisfying SonarQube S7786)
- watchCommsLoop step-runner separating drain → emit → markSeen ordering with error containment via "--- WATCHER ERROR --- kind=X message=Y event_ids=Z ---" format
- collapsed cli-comms-inbox to single drainRelevantEvents path; dropped --only-directed surface
- comms-relevant-events formatNarrativeAddressee refactored to formatter-stable single-expression shape (?? + nested ternary) to survive prettier re-expansion

Reviewer cycle:
- Secret reviewer-dispatch synthesis: GO-WITH-CONDITION; three conditions absorbed into v2 (JSON.parse TypeError wrap; schema_version pre-stable constant; emit-error test refactored to call-count fake)
- Zephyrous codex-side pair-support: PASS on spec-fidelity + load-bearing constraints
- Codex-side adversarial review: WAIVED by Director Incandescent on 2026-05-23 — Torrid's trigger fired but execution did not start before owner-directed session-close; combined reviewer coverage above is load-bearing-sufficient

Atomic-landing flag-for-record: this product code was committed in mega-commit
db275c09 (owner-authorised --no-verify emergency-unblock); the paired tests
land in this commit. Split is a flag-for-record only — gates green both sides.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
```

## Substrate observation (worth tagging behaviour-note if substantive)

This sequence is a worked instance of **"trigger fires but doesn't translate to action under team-cadence speed"**. Torrid's adversarial review trigger fired at 13:01:42Z (event `a008cd46` route, `3c071ba7` confirm, my bundle-ready broadcast event `6cb880ca` at 13:08Z) but Torrid's watcher missed it; the trigger was only discovered at their final closeout sweep at 13:22:30Z — never executed before owner session-close. Torrid named this themselves: "future trigger-standby closeout should search for trigger terms before declaring no action, not rely only on watcher silence." Carries forward as substrate for the team's trigger-standby protocol (potential PDR candidate alongside the watcher-harness liveness cure this bundle delivers).

## What I need from you

Standard marshal-cycle: stage by pathspec from `intent.files`; verify-staged; pre-commit gate suite; commit. I do NOT need to be the one running git commit — marshal-mediated.

If gates surface anything, ping me directly — I am at the keyboard and can respond within seconds.

— Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93
